content_text: Just tried the new ramen place on 5th Street and it was absolutely incredible! The tonkotsu broth was rich and creamy, and the chashu pork melted in my mouth. Highly recommend if you're in the area.

A new study published in Nature Climate Science found that Arctic ice coverage reached its lowest recorded extent in September 2025, declining 13% from the previous year. Researchers attribute the acceleration to feedback loops between ice loss and ocean warming. The findings have significant implications for global shipping routes and polar ecosystems.

The writers showed both the psychological manipulation and the difficulty of leaving without glorifying the violence itself. Content warning: the episode includes scenes of emotional abuse that some viewers may find distressing.

I served in Afghanistan from 2011-2013 and the things I saw still haunt me. War is not glorious. It's terrifying and tragic and the people who suffer most are civilians who never asked for any of it. I share my story so people understand the real cost.
